suspendModal.suspendBody: Users in this project will not be able to sign in or broadcast until it is reactivated.

suspendModal.unsuspendBody: Users in this project will be able to sign in and broadcast again.

deleteProject.title: Delete project?
deleteProject.body: This permanently deletes everything in the project: {users} users, {speakers} speakers, MP3 files, schedules, and broadcast history.
deleteProject.warning: This cannot be undone. To pause access instead, use "Suspend".
